title: Theory Different realities EoE NGE RoE
display_title: Theory Different realities EoE NGE RoE
wikitext:
[]: Theory = Different realities EoE / NGE / RoE             Quote Post by T. K. Simon » Sat Aug 14, 2021 9:21 pm Eva is a story that repeats itself, reconstruction is the last cycle, we are never told if NGE / EOE are part of the cycle, and this is the last cycle, before neon genesis (I rebuild). The concept of other realities has also been explored already in EoE and NGE (For example, Live Action EoE), with their indumenstralization, separated respectively. Or they could also be different universes in any case. Perhaps the only ones who are the same (they have the same soul in each dimension of the story) are Kaworu, Shinji, Rei, and maybe Yui and Gendo, the last 4 seem to notice it only during the indumenstrality. The golgota object links reality with fiction (creating the anti-verse), but at the same time it could also link other realities and dimensions (as we have seen during the indumenstrality of EoE), so it could answer because there are images of eoe and nge During the indumenstrality, perhaps the object links the indumenstralities of each reality, dimension, or universe. Gendo tells Shinji that he chose the world that Shinji rejected, or he refers to EoE, or he refers to a few moments before that, or because he "ate" the key of Nebuchadnezzar, he has abandoned his humanity, transcends beyond that reality, possibly knowing other dimensions and cycles (within rebuild). When he says that in the antiverse, people can remember past things, he can also mean that people who have the same soul in each dimension are capable of that, due to the book of life. Kaworu does not tell Shinji that he remembers being there so many times because they are cycles, no, he tells him because it is thanks to the book of life, they are destined to meet The red sea that we see is from the Second Impact, the moon is unknown, but it may well be due to that. The fact that only Rei, Gendo, Kaworu, and Shinji seem to be aware of loops and realities is because their soul is always the same in every story, thanks to the book of life, written by kaworu (at least Shinji). This could also explain why no one else seems to be aware of this, the beach scene eoe, it is a meta reference, Shinji might be aware of other realities and loops at the time, but Asuka seems not, original Shikinami might being like a Rei 1, not Soryu, the asukas could be different as they do not share the same soul in the Book of Life (they are not written the same way). Why could the rebuild have its own separate cycle / loop? as eva is a story that repeats itself, this last cycle is the one that ends it, the inflection point could be in Ha (where the near TI never occurs, and the TI that we never see occurs) or in Q (where the IF occurs ). Cycle = Repetition We could argue that the cycles should not be the same, yes, but the concept of different realities is present from NGE and EoE, it is a possibility. Why does Shinji remember being there several times? This could be because Shinji is the same soul in each dimension, thanks to the golgota object (which could also link realities and dimensions) he manages to see and remember other lives, only during instrumenstralization, in this case, to NGE / EoE. Kaworu is in a loop, but being an angel, he possibly remembers other "lives" of different dimensions, the fact that it is never said if NGE / EoE belong to this loop, and if they are the beginning, gives theorizing. Kaworu every time he dies, he could end up in another reality, until he reaches Rebuid and gets trapped in his own inner loop, or this kaworu is from rebuild, but by the life book, he might be aware of those memories. Manga Kaworu and Mari are discarded as they directly contradict the film (Mari) and the fact that Sadamoto has his own Canon from him, denying ties with rebuild and nge. Quietly the manga could be another dimension / universe The coffins Kaworu comes from have the Seele symbol, but from rebuild, not nge, assuming eoe / nge are part of the infinite loop, is it the end or the beginning? When did Seele NGE put them on? we never see the moon in nge, who put them first? They all seem to have the same logo all (Seele Rebuild), so should Rebuild be the first loop? Oh, the rebuild has its own loop, no connection to NGE / EOE. It has been repeated several times, it is open to interpretation. Kaworu may be the only one who sees the coffins, but the seele rebuild logo is something of a mystery The coffins are seen in 1.1, and also in 3.0 + 1.01, being many more than we imagine, maybe it is something not literal, that the seele logo is not there, but it does not seem the most probable. If the world restarts, the coffin should too, but no. Maybe only Kaworu can see it, but it is something mysterious. Kaworu is not the same as NGE? It is a possibility that the Kaworu that we see is the rebuild one. but he too he has knowledge of other lives, thanks to the book of life, he can remember This is a theory, like others, it is clearly not the truth, but it is a possibility, and it should not be ruled out. EoE = Reject EoTV = Reject (although it could have also accepted) RoE = makes a Neon Genesis

[]: Re: My cent             Quote Post by rangure0412 » Sat Aug 14, 2021 9:56 pm I'm agree with you in everything. Except with the part that Kaworu is Adam. We know in Rebuild there's actually 4 adams. And apparently Kaworu soul don't have any direct relation with this Adams, except being their son as Angel. So metauniversally speaking Rebuild Kaworu and NGE Kawore are not exactly the same being but two sides of the same coin.

[]: Re: My cent             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Aug 14, 2021 10:03 pm rangure0412 wrote: Except with the part that Kaworu is Adam. We know in Rebuild there's actually 4 adams. And apparently Kaworu soul don't have any direct relation with this Adams, except being their son as Angel. So metauniversally speaking Rebuild Kaworu and NGE Kawore are not exactly the same being but two sides of the same coin.
